name: all-bg-go
description: Parallel fan-out trigger — user says "all bg go" (or equivalent) → print a plan table (branch · subagent_type · isolation · goal) then spawn one background Agent per branch in the same message. TWO modes: prior-turn (fan out branches the previous turn offered) + self-enumerate (no prior branches → derive next viable work items itself, then fan out). Makes `all bg go` a repeatable next-list → fan-out → loop driver.
